rationale.fidelity: Correctly maps review selection, the 200-item capacity, latent violation status, post-selection review findings, and expected prevented harm.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete actor, trigger, feasible choices, opportunity-cost trade-off, counterfactual, and operational mechanism.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No contribution is claimed; the response appropriately says positioning is provisional without a literature baseline.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Separates model assumptions from operational evidence needs and does not imply perfect ranking or known violations.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and well organized, though substantially more repetitive and template-heavy than necessary.
rationale.overall: A complete, model-faithful framing; verbosity is the only meaningful weakness.
